chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يُشْرِكُ قَرَابَتَهُ وَ إِخْوَتَهُ فِي حَجَّتِهِ أَوْ يَصِلُهُمْ بِحَجَّةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The one who participates his relatives and his brethren in his Hajj, or he links them with Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/232)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/232)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ وَصَلَ أَبَاهُ أَوْ ذَا قَرَابَةٍ لَهُ فَطَافَ عَنْهُ كَانَ لَهُ أَجْرُهُ كَامِلًا وَ لِلَّذِي طَافَ عَنْهُ مِثْلُ أَجْرِهِ وَ يُفَضَّلُ هُوَ بِصِلَتِهِ إِيَّاهُ بِطَوَافٍ آخَرَ
وَ قَالَ مَنْ حَجَّ فَجَعَلَ حَجَّتَهُ عَنْ ذِي قَرَابَتِهِ يَصِلُهُ بِهَا كَانَتْ حَجَّتُهُ كَامِلَةً وَ كَانَ لِلَّذِي حَجَّ عَنْهُ مِثْلُ أَجْرِهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَاسِعٌ لِذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Ibn Abu hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who links his father, or one of his relatives, so he circumambulates on his behalf, for him would be his Recompense, complete, and for the one on whose behalf he circumambulated would be similar to his Recompense, and he would be merited with his linking him with another circumambulation’.

And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one performs Hajj, so he makes his Hajj to be on behalf of his relative, linking him with it, his Hajj would be complete, and for the one on whose behalf he performed Hajj would be the like of his Recompense. Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would Expand for that’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad, from ibn abu Nasr, from Ali ibn abu Hamzah, from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘For keeping good relations if one joins his father or relatives in the reward of performing Tawaf, he receives his reward completely; and one, for whom Tawaf is made, receives his reward, and for keeping good relations, there is additional reward like one more Tawaf.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘If one performs al-Hajj and assigns the reward for it to a relative, he will have the reward for a complete al-Hajj and a similar reward is for one on whose behalf al-Hajj is performed. Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, is the one who expands such a reward.’”
